title: The credibility of this Eva FAQ site
display_title: The credibility of this Eva FAQ site
wikitext:
[]: The credibility of this Eva FAQ site?             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Sep 09, 2007 10:44 am http://www.therossman.com/evafaqs.html I was linked here on another site, and once I got past the horrible, horrible webpage design, I started looking at a lot of the information and just said "lolwut". Like what they had to say about the First Impact. Some stuff seems truer than others. How accurate would my fellow Evantologists say the information of this site is? Have we already taken note of this site in the past, or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sun Sep 09, 2007 10:58 am It's not as totally messed up as some of the so-called Eva FAQs I've read, but it's not particularly accurate either. There are several errors/common misconceptions (Toji losing his arm, Shinji and Asuka being in "heaven" at the end of EoE, Naoko Akagi is the soul of Eva-00, etc.).

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:16 am They, uh, seem to think the religious imagery is serious business. Apparently they never got the memo.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:59 am Lilith is Adam's runaway wife? OH, SHâ€” Now I have to restart TToR404 from the beginning...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 09, 2007 2:29 pm That's some hella-insanely old FAQ site (older than Evaotaku, I think) so I would NOT take any stock in it! It has absolute bullshit such as LOL ADAM AND EVE and NAOKO IN ZEROGOKI! Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Sep 09, 2007 4:07 pm It's not as horrible as I thought it was going to be but still the guy needs to update it. The big glaring mistakes are glaringly big. Unfortunately it's sites like these why so many people think "Old Hag" Akagi is the soul of Eva-00. That one bugs me as much as Misato shot Kaji. :?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:58 pm Wow, he thought Lilith was Adam's wife ? Did he have an Adam-Lilith doujinshi in mind, something along the lines of Angel kiss? No wait, that means that Rei and Kaworu are going to... GOD, WHAT AM I SAYING????? :shock: Oh, and to answer the original question...that FAQ site serves only to confuse, not to clarify.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 09, 2007 8:10 pm Agreed. The only good part about it is this, which seems to specifically rag on Dub-Shinji: http://www.therossman.com/shinjispage/ Best parts, I think: 3)Q: What were the final two TV episodes and the End of Evangelion movie about? I didn't get them. Can you explain them to me? A: They uh, were about...... stuff. I, uh don't like my father. He's uh not too nice. I miss my mother. 5)Q: Are you like gay or something? Why were you like so into Kaworu? A: I thought that she was cute is all. Um, okay? He was a guy, dude! What?!?!?! Nani?!?!!?!! 14)Q: How many movies were there? A: *Sigh*. Too many, but apparently not enough. Frighteningly enough, this is one of the first Eva sites I stumbled across. Thankfully I've already seen some of the show by then so I was skeptical about what this said. Oh and Rei/Kaworu doing that would be amusing, actually. :mrgreen:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 09, 2007 8:36 pm Places like this confued the hell out of me and brought me to EM in the first place

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:03 pm I sent this guy email years ago saying that there were problems with his FAQ and he replied "Rock On, Dude!" and that was that.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:06 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: LOL ADAM AND EVE and NAOKO IN ZEROGOKI! Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:12 pm http://evacommentary.org/forums/viewtopic.php?t=143 http://evacommentary.org/forums/viewtopic.php?t=141

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:18 pm Ornette wrote: http://evacommentary.org/forums/viewtopic.php?t=143 http://evacommentary.org/forums/viewtopic.php?t=141

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:19 pm shinesman_cobalt wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: LOL ADAM AND EVE and NAOKO IN ZEROGOKI! Seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:21 pm shinesman_cobalt wrote: If it's not Naoko, then WHO exactly is in Unit Zero?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:25 pm Who is this Mikasa Hinako? The only Google search result for this name is another post you made long times ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:25 pm The "Who's soul is in Eva-00?" thing is one plot point I'd really like Rebuild to clear up.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:28 pm I like Asuka 'cause she's cute! Never mind the fact that her brain is so f***ed up that it's impossible for her to make any logical decisions ever again for fear of hurting herself either physically or mentally. Damn is she cute@_@

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:40 pm Sandoz wrote: The "Who's soul is in Eva-00?" thing is one plot point I'd really like Rebuild to clear up.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:45 pm NAveryW wrote: Who is this Mikasa Hinako? The only Google search result for this name is another post you made long times ago.
